name: C2xGetStationAttributeDouble
title: C2xGetStationAttributeDouble
syntax: float C2xGetStationAttributeDouble(char[] stationName, char[] attributeName); // form 2
description: This function returns the actual value of the floating point typed scenario attribute. Form 1 of the function returns values of an attribute of the calling (current) station. Form 2 allows to get values of all attributes of any station in the scenario, even if the scenario station does not have an assigned database node.

parameters.name: attributeName
parameters.description: Name of the scenario attribute which belongs to the scenario station specified by stationName parameter.

return: The floating point value of the attribute at the time of function call.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
